name: DERIPHYLLINE RTD 30 1*30
description: Bronchodilator medication containing etofylline and theophylline for treating airway obstruction associated with asthma and COPD.
dosage: As prescribed by physician; swallow whole with water at fixed times.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature in a clean and dry place, protected from moisture, sunlight and heat.

name: DERIPHYLLIN RTD 150 1*10
description: Bronchodilator medication containing etofylline and theophylline for treating airway obstruction associated with asthma and COPD.
dosage: As prescribed by physician; swallow whole with water at fixed times.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature in a clean and dry place, protected from moisture, sunlight and heat.

name: DERMIFORD OINT 25GM
description: Topical antimicrobial and steroid cream for skin treatment applications.

name: DEXORANGE  CAP
description: Dietary supplement containing essential vitamins and minerals used to treat iron-deficiency anaemia and prevent nutritional deficiencies.
uses: Treatment and prevention of iron-deficiency anaemia
Prevention of deficiencies during pregnancy and nursing
dosage: Take as advised by the doctor, one hour before meals.
storageInstructions: Store at a cool and dry place. Keep away from children and pets.

name: DICLOFENAC INJ. (INT)
description: Injectable pain relief medication containing diclofenac sodium, used to alleviate acute pain and inflammation associated with various conditions.
uses: Rheumatoid arthritis and osteoarthritis pain relief
dosage: Administered by healthcare professional in hospital or clinic.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C at a cool and dry place away from direct sunlight.

name: DICLOWIN PLUS TAB
description: An effective pain reliever used to relieve pain in conditions like joint pain, muscle pain, headache, dental pain, migraine, and period pain.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place protected from moisture.

name: DIGITAL THERMOMETER 1*1
description: A digital thermometer featuring a flexible tip, designed for accurate temperature measurement across all age groups.
uses: Body temperature measurement for infants, children, and adults

name: DILZEM 30MG 1*15TABS
description: Blood pressure-lowering medicine containing diltiazem for treating high blood pressure and angina.
dosage: Take as prescribed by doctor with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from sunlight and moisture.

name: DILZEM-60 1*15TAB
description: A medication that lowers blood pressure, containing diltiazem, used for managing high blood pressure and chest pain related to reduced heart blood flow.
dosage: Take as prescribed by doctor before or after meals with water.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place away from sunlight and moisture.

name: DIOVOL LIQ 1*170ML
description: A combination oral solution designed to relieve symptoms caused by excess stomach acid and gas.
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; shake well before use; typically after meals and at bedtime.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place. Protect from direct sunlight and moisture.
